text: The Fable agent's UX spec is at `/private/tmp/claude-501/.../scratchpad/tenex-edge-config-ux-spec.md` (478 lines). I applied its highest-value calls: the color palette, the merged provider-list-with-actions pattern (vs. a separate Add/Edit/Remove menu), Test connection, correct secret masking, skip-trivial-choice, and the "no providers → offer to set one up" bridge. Not yet applied (deferred as lower-priority polish, not blocking): the confirm screen's `was: <old value>` diff line, OSC-11 dark/light auto-detection, the braille spinner (currently a plain dimmed line), and response caching for OpenRouter's 300+ model fetch within a session — happy to do any of these next if you want the full spec realized. [...] For the user: the design agent's report matches what I already pulled from the spec file and incorporated (palette, merged provider list+actions, error recovery, confirm pattern). Still not implemented: OSC-11 theme auto-detection and the `was: <old value>` diff line on the confirm screen. Want me to add either of those now, or leave the current build as-is?
